마가복음 10:1.content: He arose from there and came into the borders of Judea and beyond the Jordan. Multitudes came together to him again. As he usually did, he was again teaching them.

마가복음 10:2.content: Pharisees came to him testing him, and asked him, “Is it lawful for a man to divorce his wife?”

마가복음 10:3.content: He answered, “What did Moses command you?”

마가복음 10:4.content: They said, “Moses allowed a certificate of divorce to be written, and to divorce her.”

마가복음 10:5.content: But Jesus said to them, “For your hardness of heart, he wrote you this commandment.

마가복음 10:6.content: But from the beginning of the creation, God made them male and female.

마가복음 10:7.content: For this cause a man will leave his father and mother, and will join to his wife,

마가복음 10:8.content: and the two will become one flesh, so that they are no longer two, but one flesh.

마가복음 10:9.content: What therefore God has joined together, let no man separate.”

마가복음 10:10.content: In the house, his disciples asked him again about the same matter.

마가복음 10:11.content: He said to them, “Whoever divorces his wife, and marries another, commits adultery against her.

마가복음 10:12.content: If a woman herself divorces her husband, and marries another, she commits adultery.”

마가복음 10:13.content: They were bringing to him little children, that he should touch them, but the disciples rebuked those who were bringing them.

마가복음 10:14.content: But when Jesus saw it, he was moved with indignation, and said to them, “Allow the little children to come to me! Don’t forbid them, for God’s Kingdom belongs to such as these.

마가복음 10:15.content: Most certainly I tell you, whoever will not receive God’s Kingdom like a little child, he will in no way enter into it.”

마가복음 10:16.content: He took them in his arms, and blessed them, laying his hands on them.

마가복음 10:17.content: As he was going out into the way, one ran to him, knelt before him, and asked him, “Good Teacher, what shall I do that I may inherit eternal life?”

마가복음 10:18.content: Jesus said to him, “Why do you call me good? No one is good except one—God.

마가복음 10:19.content: You know the commandments: ‘Do not murder,’ ‘Do not commit adultery,’ ‘Do not steal,’ ‘Do not give false testimony,’ ‘Do not defraud,’ ‘Honor your father and mother.’ ”

마가복음 10:20.content: He said to him, “Teacher, I have observed all these things from my youth.”

마가복음 10:21.content: Jesus looking at him loved him, and said to him, “One thing you lack. Go, sell whatever you have, and give to the poor, and you will have treasure in heaven; and come, follow me, taking up the cross.”

마가복음 10:22.content: But his face fell at that saying, and he went away sorrowful, for he was one who had great possessions.

마가복음 10:23.content: Jesus looked around, and said to his disciples, “How difficult it is for those who have riches to enter into God’s Kingdom!”

마가복음 10:24.content: The disciples were amazed at his words. But Jesus answered again, “Children, how hard it is for those who trust in riches to enter into God’s Kingdom!

마가복음 10:25.content: It is easier for a camel to go through a needle’s eye than for a rich man to enter into God’s Kingdom.”

마가복음 10:26.content: They were exceedingly astonished, saying to him, “Then who can be saved?”

마가복음 10:27.content: Jesus, looking at them, said, “With men it is impossible, but not with God, for all things are possible with God.”

마가복음 10:28.content: Peter began to tell him, “Behold, we have left all, and have followed you.”

마가복음 10:29.content: Jesus said, “Most certainly I tell you, there is no one who has left house, or brothers, or sisters, or father, or mother, or wife, or children, or land, for my sake, and for the sake of the Good News,

마가복음 10:30.content: but he will receive one hundred times more now in this time: houses, brothers, sisters, mothers, children, and land, with persecutions; and in the age to come eternal life.

마가복음 10:31.content: But many who are first will be last; and the last first.”

마가복음 10:32.content: They were on the way, going up to Jerusalem; and Jesus was going in front of them, and they were amazed; and those who followed were afraid. He again took the twelve, and began to tell them the things that were going to happen to him.

마가복음 10:33.content: “Behold, we are going up to Jerusalem. The Son of Man will be delivered to the chief priests and the scribes. They will condemn him to death, and will deliver him to the Gentiles.

마가복음 10:34.content: They will mock him, spit on him, scourge him, and kill him. On the third day he will rise again.”

마가복음 10:35.content: James and John, the sons of Zebedee, came near to him, saying, “Teacher, we want you to do for us whatever we will ask.”

마가복음 10:36.content: He said to them, “What do you want me to do for you?”

마가복음 10:37.content: They said to him, “Grant to us that we may sit, one at your right hand, and one at your left hand, in your glory.”

마가복음 10:38.content: But Jesus said to them, “You don’t know what you are asking. Are you able to drink the cup that I drink, and to be baptized with the baptism that I am baptized with?”

마가복음 10:39.content: They said to him, “We are able.” Jesus said to them, “You shall indeed drink the cup that I drink, and you shall be baptized with the baptism that I am baptized with;

마가복음 10:40.content: but to sit at my right hand and at my left hand is not mine to give, but for whom it has been prepared.”

마가복음 10:41.content: When the ten heard it, they began to be indignant toward James and John.

마가복음 10:42.content: Jesus summoned them, and said to them, “You know that they who are recognized as rulers over the nations lord it over them, and their great ones exercise authority over them.

마가복음 10:43.content: But it shall not be so among you, but whoever wants to become great among you shall be your servant.

마가복음 10:44.content: Whoever of you wants to become first among you, shall be bondservant of all.

마가복음 10:45.content: For the Son of Man also came not to be served, but to serve, and to give his life as a ransom for many.”

마가복음 10:46.content: They came to Jericho. As he went out from Jericho, with his disciples and a great multitude, the son of Timaeus, Bartimaeus, a blind beggar, was sitting by the road.

마가복음 10:47.content: When he heard that it was Jesus the Nazarene, he began to cry out, and say, “Jesus, you son of David, have mercy on me!”

마가복음 10:48.content: Many rebuked him, that he should be quiet, but he cried out much more, “You son of David, have mercy on me!”

마가복음 10:49.content: Jesus stood still, and said, “Call him.” They called the blind man, saying to him, “Cheer up! Get up. He is calling you!”

마가복음 10:50.content: He, casting away his cloak, sprang up, and came to Jesus.

마가복음 10:51.content: Jesus asked him, “What do you want me to do for you?” The blind man said to him, “Rabboni, that I may see again.”

마가복음 10:52.content: Jesus said to him, “Go your way. Your faith has made you well.” Immediately he received his sight, and followed Jesus on the way.
